headline: Earnings Preview: Packaging Corp. (PKG) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Packaging Corp. (PKG) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Packaging Corp of America, Raises Price Target to $270
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Roxland   maintains Packaging Corp of America (NYSE:PKG) with a Buy and raises the price target from $258 to $270.
